/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/cc -g -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX11.3.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/Lab_9.dir/lsh-master/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/Lab_9.dir/processes/Exec/env.c.o CMakeFiles/Lab_9.dir/processes/Exec/exec_error.c.o CMakeFiles/Lab_9.dir/processes/Exec/execl.c.o CMakeFiles/Lab_9.dir/processes/Exec/execle.c.o CMakeFiles/Lab_9.dir/processes/Exec/execlp.c.o CMakeFiles/Lab_9.dir/processes/Exec/execv.c.o CMakeFiles/Lab_9.dir/processes/Exec/execve.c.o CMakeFiles/Lab_9.dir/processes/Exec/execvp.c.o CMakeFiles/Lab_9.dir/processes/Exec/getenv.c.o CMakeFiles/Lab_9.dir/processes/Exec/system_use.c.o CMakeFiles/Lab_9.dir/processes/GettingStarted/getpid.c.o CMakeFiles/Lab_9.dir/processes/LetsFork/fork1.c.o CMakeFiles/Lab_9.dir/processes/LetsFork/fork2.c.o CMakeFiles/Lab_9.dir/processes/LetsFork/fork_ex.c.o CMakeFiles/Lab_9.dir/processes/Misc/whileLoop.c.o CMakeFiles/Lab_9.dir/processes/Shell/arguArray.c.o CMakeFiles/Lab_9.dir/processes/Shell/chdir.c.o CMakeFiles/Lab_9.dir/processes/Shell/getcwd.c.o CMakeFiles/Lab_9.dir/processes/Shell/setenv.c.o CMakeFiles/Lab_9.dir/processes/Signals/custom.c.o CMakeFiles/Lab_9.dir/processes/Signals/kill.c.o CMakeFiles/Lab_9.dir/processes/Signals/sigign.c.o CMakeFiles/Lab_9.dir/processes/Wait/problematic2.c.o CMakeFiles/Lab_9.dir/processes/Wait/sleep.c.o CMakeFiles/Lab_9.dir/processes/Wait/wait.c.o CMakeFiles/Lab_9.dir/processes/Wait/waitpid.c.o -o Lab_9
